attributes.name: Summary
attributes.description:
=Summarize the content of all posts. If there is no content, return "No content" and don't add anything further.

If there is content, write bullet points indicating what the group focuses on. For example: Focuses on market insights, BTC price prediction, Technical Analysis Mentions, courses/support, or private group.

Summarize in 1-2 sentences, approximately 10-20 words

attributes.name: Mention
attributes.description:
=Does the content mentioned in the post relate to exchanges such as BingX, Bybit, MeXC, Binance, etc.?

If yes, answer yes and list the exchange mentioned without further explanation.
If no, simply answer "Not" without further explanation.

attributes.name: Spam
attributes.description: Provide the number of articles that are unrelated to the given keywords.

attributes.name: referral link
attributes.description:
=If the message contains a call to action (CTA) related to a referral link, access the message in the format https://t.me/<channel>/<message_id>, retrieve the information from {{ $json.crawl.items.toJsonString() }} to view the message and provide the referral link. For example, with donglaochoicoinofficial, I see message 3600 has a CTA signal with a referral link, and as I predicted, that group has a referral link: https://accounts.binance.com/register?ref=FKAEL72N.

If it doesn't return "Not",

Do the same and provide the post with the referral link, including all referral links.

attributes.name: referral bingx or not
attributes.description: =If the message contains a call to action (CTA) related to a Bing X referral link, access the message in the format https://t.me/<channel>/<message_id>, retrieve the information from {{ $json.crawl.items.toJsonString() }} to view the message and provide the Bing X referral link. For example, with donglaochoicoinofficial, I see the message has this message: https://t.me/donglaochoicoinofficial/1426 which has a Bing X referral link: https://bingx.com/vi-vn/?ref=EAXFK2  Do the same and provide the post with the referral link.  If there is a Bing X referral link: if there is, provide the link; if not, write "Not

attributes.name: language
attributes.description:
=Specifies the language of the article. It only returns the language it belongs to and doesn't specify anything else. For example: Vietnamese, Indonesian.
If unknow retrun "Multilingual"

options.systemMessage:
=**Role:** Crypto Telegram Search Expert.
**Task:** Generate 5-10 specialized crypto-related search terms by adding suffixes to a primary keyword.

**Operational Workflow:**

1. **Language Detection:** Identify the language of the primary keyword to generate appropriate suffixes (e.g., if Vietnamese: "Kèo", "Săn Gem", "Tin tức"; if English: "Signals", "Alpha", "Global").
2. **Suffix Selection:** Use high-traffic Telegram crypto terms: *Community, Official, Airdrop, Gems, Pump, Trading, Chat, VIP, News, Hub, Alpha, Signals, Alerts.*
3. **Exclusion Algorithm:** - Compare every new keyword against the **Danh sách loại trừ**: `{{ $('Keyword').all().map(item => item.json['Dãy từ khoá'] ) }}`.
* Comparison must be **case-insensitive** and **ignore extra whitespace**.
* If a match exists, replace it immediately with a unique variation.


4. **Quantity:** Output between **5 and 10** unique results.

**Strict Constraints:**

* **Output ONLY the final list of keywords.**
* **Formatting:** All results must be separated ONLY by a comma (`,`).
* **NO** explanations, **NO** greetings, **NO** introductory text, **NO** line breaks.

**Input Structure:**

* Primary Keyword: [User Input]
